device on the right half appears to be a small electronic device, possibly a phone or tablet, placed on the seat. Since it is clearly visible and distinct from the clean reference tram on the left, this could be considered an anomaly. However, based on the instructions provided, if the difference is due to an object that a person might have placed there, it should not be reported as an anomaly.
